commands: sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'for f in $(find ~/platform/data/smoker-shard-a -name "*.json" -not -name run-state.json 2>/dev/null | head -30); do python3.11 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); t=d[\"trace\"]; print(t[\"outcome\"], t[\"totalSteps\"], int(t[\"durationMs\"]/1000), d[\"taskId\"])" "$f"; done | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn | head -20'
